intent.one_sentence: A wet neon alley material market with emissive signs, chrome, glass, steam, and dense authored storefronts.
intent.art_goal: Push emissive bloom, particles, wet asphalt, chrome, glass, and cinematic post without disconnected set dressing.

foreground_midground_background.foreground: Wet asphalt, puddles, cable anchors, and reflective curb.
foreground_midground_background.midground: Market stalls, glass cases, neon signs, chrome props.
foreground_midground_background.background: Layered alley depth with haze and colored silhouettes.

lighting.key: Magenta sign wall from left storefronts.
lighting.fill: Blue rain bounce from right and ground puddles.
lighting.fog: Colored wet haze and steam pockets.

cameras.role: Dense alley depth, wet pavement, signs, and storefronts.
cameras.art_reason: Low close lens keeps the alley geometry, display case, mounted signs, and wet floor tied together without leaning on the external city HDRI.

cameras.role: Chrome, glass case, emissive signs, and wet ground closeup.
cameras.art_reason: Judges material separation under colored light.

cameras.role: Steam, rain, and bloom shafts down the alley.
cameras.art_reason: Backlit view makes particles visible without turning into noise.

material_palette.description: Dark wet pavement with puddles and grime.
Mounted emissive signage with bloom control.
Chrome trims and wet pipes in colored light.

assets.art_reason: Storefront wall anchors signs, cables, and glass cases.
Sign is physically mounted to storefront, not floating in air.
Small mask bars and secondary blade signs make the signage read designed instead of blank glowing rectangles.
Glass case gives reflections and refraction a believable object.

authored_groups.art_reason: Signs, mounts, frames, and cables are tied to storefront geometry.
Pavement, curb, puddles, and drains make reflections grounded.
Glass and chrome display objects provide material focus.

seeded_random_groups.art_reason: Secondary atmosphere tied to drains and warm fixtures.
